nasb.text: Like an eagle that stirs up its nest, That hovers over its young, He spread His wings and caught them, He carried them on His pinions.

esv.text: Like an eagle that stirs up its nest, that flutters over its young, spreading out its wings, catching them, bearing them on its pinions,

cnv.text: 又像老鷹攪動巢窩， 飛翔在雛鷹之上， 搧展翅膀，接取雛鷹， 背在自己的兩翼之上。

ccb.text: 又如老鹰搅动窝巢， 盘旋在雏鹰之上，展开双翼， 背着雏鹰飞翔。
